message:
🌱 Add vault: Vault OIDC flow breaks fails to prompt users to login when mission (#1117)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vault-27772-vault-oidc-flow-breaks-fails-to-prompt-users-to-login-when-their-cli",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vault: Vault OIDC flow breaks fails to prompt users to login when their client tokens have expired",
+    "description": "Vault OIDC flow breaks fails to prompt users to login when their client tokens have expired. This issue affects 14+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify vault troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your vault installation:\n```bash\nvault version\nvault status\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vault configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\nIn older versions of vault a user would be prompted to log back into Vault when their Web UI client token had expired."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Vault OIDC flow breaks fails to prompt users to login when…",
+        "description": "When the error handling changed in this PR: https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/pull/25953 the error handling failed to redirect users to authenticate in the OIDC provider workflow. \n\n> ### Testing\n> I spent a while trying to figure out a way to revoke the user's token to simulate the reported bug\n```yaml\n# start the two versions of vault\n[~]$ docker compose up\n\n# configure terraform\n[~]$    terraform init \\\n; terraform workspace new broken \\\n; terraform workspace new working\n\n# bootstrap the older version of vault that wasn't busted (v1.15.6)\n[~]$ terraform workspace select working\n\n[~]$ terraform apply -var=vault_addr=http://localhost:8200\n\n# bootstrap a more modern version where vault appears busted\n[~]$ terraform workspace select broken\n\n[~]$ terraform apply -var=vault_addr=http://localhost:8201\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Vault OIDC flow breaks fails to prompt users to… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest vault to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "When the error handling changed in this PR: https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/pull/25953 the error handling failed to redirect users to authenticate in the OIDC provider workflow. \n\n> ### Testing\n> I spent a while trying to figure out a way to revoke the user's token to simulate the reported bug but with our test  architecture that's very challenging.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# start the two versions of vault\n[~]$ docker compose up\n\n# configure terraform\n[~]$    terraform init \\\n; terraform workspace new broken \\\n; terraform workspace new working\n\n# bootstrap the older version of vault that wasn't busted (v1.15.6)\n[~]$ terraform workspace select working\n\n[~]$ terraform apply -var=vault_addr=http://localhost:8200\n\n# bootstrap a more modern version where vault appears busted\n[~]$ terraform workspace select broken\n\n[~]$ terraform apply -var=vault_addr=http://localhost:8201",
+        "[~]$ vault token revoke \\\n  -address=http://localhost:8200 \\\n    hvs....\n\n[~]$ vault token revoke \\\n  -address=http://localhost:8201 \\\n    hvs....",
+        "errors: [\n    \"permission denied\"\n]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vault",
+      "community",
+      "secrets",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "vault"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/issues/27772",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/hashicorp/vault/pull/30838"
+    },
+    "reactions": 14,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+      "vault"
+    ],

+  },
